sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size = Account Size / (Maximum Loss / f). Example: 50,000 / (5,000 / 0.1) = 1 unit. f=0.1 used in calculation.

source_rule_text: Position size is calculated using the formula 50,000 divided by the result of (Maximum Loss divided by Optimal f), where the example shows 50,000/(5,000/0.1) = 1 unit.
